description: TRDI Office and Warehouse overall floor plan (A1.0, Duncan Architects). image.png is the production analysis input: page rasterized at 144 DPI then capped to MAX_ANALYSIS_PX=2400 by cv_service (effective dpi 71), which makes the wall strokes 1-2 px thin. Regression case for the thin-stroke footprint collapse that dropped the entire warehouse perimeter. plan.pdf kept for provenance.
